_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: In each of the 39 white matter tracts, we found lower NDI values in NF1 and NS compared to TD (all p < 0.0001)
details: Successfully analyzed 39 white matter tracts, finding lower NDI values in NF1 and NS compared to TD in all tracts (all p < 0.0001). Largest effects in middle cerebellar peduncle (estimated difference 0.078, d = 3.03), left optic radiation (estimate 0.064, d = 2.05), and corticospinal tracts (d > 2.0)
